query: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, rarity, AVG(power_percent) as avg_pow, MIN(power_percent) as min_pow, MAX(power_percent) as max_pow, AVG(mp_cost) as avg_mp, AVG(cooldown) as avg_cd FROM game_monster_skill_catalog WHERE is_active = 1 GROUP BY rarity
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, rarity, AVG(power_percent) as avg_pow, MIN(power_percent) as min_pow, MAX(power_percent) as max_pow, AVG(mp_cost) as avg_mp, AVG(cooldown) as avg_cd FROM game_monster_skill_catalog WHERE is_active = 1 GROUP BY rarity
